subcodes.first_line: O thou plant of the garden of the love of God! Thy letter was received; its contents were of the utmost grace and sweetness.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال باغ محبت الله نامه ات رسید مضمون بی نهایت شیرین و دلنشین بود چون توجه بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
